command:
DATA_DIR=/tmp/atrun python -c "
import os,shutil; shutil.rmtree('/tmp/atrun',ignore_errors=True)
from truth import Bullet,Experience,Skill,Truth,save,load
save(Truth(experiences=[Experience(id='exp-1',role='Engineer',company='Acme',start='2020',end='2023',source='linkedin-pdf',bullets=[Bullet('exp-1-b-1','Built a payments API in Python','linkedin-pdf')])],skills=[Skill('sk-python','Python','linkedin-pdf')]))
from coverletter.generate import _all_values
from guardrail import Scope, validate
t=load()
av=_all_values(t)
print('allowed',av)
r=validate([Scope(id='edited',texts=['Built a payments API in Python at Acme'],allowed=av)])
print(r.ok, r.unverifiable, [(c.text,c.tokens) for c in r.blocked_claims])
"

exit 0
